name: 86 Chaos 15.0.65 Voice, Scheduling, Availability, Reminders, and Event Reminder Polish
label: 86 Chaos 15.0.65
notes: Fixes duplicate voice reminder commits, adds request-off archive/history filters, adds employee availability records and Schedule Builder warnings, adds reminder snooze and due dots, dedupes in-app toasts, adds Event Calendar push/order reminder settings, updates Brother QL-810W prep label printing, and reorders the main menu with Time Clock & Schedule first.
